documents.text: Sleep session recorded on 2026-03-21. myAir score: 85/100. Therapy hours: 7.2 hours. Mask seal: Good. AHI (Apnea-Hypopnea Index): 3.2 events/hour. Device: AirSense 11 AutoSet. Pressure range: 8-14 cmH2O. Leak rate: 12 L/min (acceptable). Usage: Continuous positive airway pressure therapy for obstructive sleep apnea.

Sleep session recorded on 2026-03-22. myAir score: 78/100. Therapy hours: 6.5 hours. Mask seal: Fair. AHI: 4.1 events/hour. Device: AirSense 11 AutoSet. Pressure range: 8-14 cmH2O. Leak rate: 18 L/min (slightly elevated). Events detected: 2 central apneas, 8 obstructive hypopneas.

Sleep session recorded on 2026-03-23. myAir score: 92/100. Therapy hours: 8.1 hours. Mask seal: Excellent. AHI: 1.8 events/hour. Device: AirSense 11 AutoSet. Pressure range: 8-14 cmH2O. Leak rate: 8 L/min (good). This was the best session this week.
Sleep session recorded on 2026-03-24. myAir score: 88/100. Therapy hours: 7.8 hours. Mask seal: Good. AHI: 2.5 events/hour. Device: AirSense 11 AutoSet. Consistent therapy usage pattern maintained.
Sleep session recorded on 2026-03-25. myAir score: 80/100. Therapy hours: 6.9 hours. Mask seal: Good. AHI: 3.5 events/hour. Device: AirSense 11 AutoSet.

FHIR R4 MedicationRequest: Active prescription for CPAP therapy equipment (AirSense 11 AutoSet). Prescribed by Dr. Sleep Medicine. Start date: 2025-06-15. Status: active. Diagnosis: Obstructive Sleep Apnea (ICD-10: G47.33). Insurance: Covered under durable medical equipment benefit.

FHIR R4 Condition: Obstructive Sleep Apnea, moderate severity. ICD-10: G47.33. Onset: 2024-11-01. Clinical status: active. Verification: confirmed via polysomnography. AHI at diagnosis: 22 events/hour (moderate). Current AHI on CPAP therapy: 2-4 events/hour (well-controlled).

FHIR R4 CarePlan: Sleep apnea management plan. Goals: maintain AHI below 5 events/hour, achieve therapy compliance above 70% of nights with at least 4 hours usage. Activities: nightly CPAP therapy, monthly myAir score review, annual sleep study. Next review: 2026-06-15.

Weekly sleep summary: March 17-23, 2026. Average myAir score: 82/100. Average therapy hours: 7.0 hours/night. Average AHI: 3.0 events/hour. Compliance: 7/7 nights (100%). Trend: Improving mask seal quality. Recommendation: Continue current therapy settings.

EHR Clinical Note: Patient reports improved daytime alertness since starting CPAP therapy. Epworth Sleepiness Scale score improved from 14 (moderate) to 6 (normal). No side effects reported. Mask fit is comfortable. Patient is compliant with nightly usage.

Sleep session recorded on 2026-03-21. myAir score: 65/100. Therapy hours: 4.2 hours. Mask seal: Poor. AHI: 8.5 events/hour. Device: AirSense 11 AutoSet. Leak rate: 32 L/min (high). Mask adjustment recommended.
FHIR R4 Condition: Severe Obstructive Sleep Apnea. ICD-10: G47.33. AHI at diagnosis: 45 events/hour (severe). Current AHI on CPAP: 8-12 events/hour (suboptimal). Pressure adjustment may be needed.
FHIR R4 MedicationRequest: Active prescription for bilevel positive airway pressure (BiPAP) equipment. Under evaluation for switching from CPAP to BiPAP due to persistent central apneas.
